input.command: sleep 2 && echo "=== Testing frontend-backend connection ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend accessible" || echo "Frontend not accessible" && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/devices > /dev/null && echo "Backend accessible" || echo "Backend not accessible"

state.output:
=== Testing frontend-backend connection ===
Frontend accessible
Backend accessible
state.title: Test frontend-backend connectivity

metadata.output:
